data.name: tags
data.value: rag, ai-integration, content-pipeline, workflow-orchestration, ci-cd, requirements-analysis

data.name: summary
data.value: Phased implementation roadmap for a portfolio chatbot built on a RAG architecture, outlining project setup, ingestion engine development, retrieval system implementation, chat API creation, and frontend integration, along with testing strategy, deployment approach, performance targets, and risk mitigation for delivering a scalable, low-infrastructure AI-driven documentation assistant.
